name: Coconut Delight Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the cake according to the package directions.
2. Allow the cake to cool completely.
3. In a large bowl, combine the Cool Whip, sour cream, sugar, and coconut flakes until well mixed.
4. Cut the cooled cake into 4 layers using a knife or a cake server.
5. Spread half of the mixture between each layer of the cake.
6. Cover the top and sides of the cake with the remaining mixture.
7. If desired, add an additional carton of Cool Whip to help frost the top and sides more evenly.
8. Garnish the cake with cherries and nuts if you like. Feel free to experiment by adding different ingredients to the Cool Whip, such as well-drained crushed pineapple, for added flavor and texture.
This is a versatile recipe that can be customized based on your preferences. Enjoy!
